title: Abstract virtual class must redeclare inherited pure virtual method

features.name: virtual_class_inheriting_pure_virtual_without_redeclare
features.description: Code should include a virtual class that extends a base class containing a pure virtual function, where the derived virtual class does not redeclare that inherited pure virtual function

features.name: pure_virtual_function_in_class
features.description: Code should include a pure virtual function declaration without implementation inside a class body

features.name: virtual_class_with_extends
features.description: Code should include a virtual class declaration that extends a base class using the extends keyword
